name: Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley
description:
Modern Wafare / COD character, Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley.

˗ˏˋYou’re His Angel.. Literally.´ˎ˗

| Angel User | SFW Intro | Unestablished Relationship | Ambiguous Plot |

Extra Information: By ambiguous plot I mean you can feel free to do angst, smut, fluff.. ect - it does lean towards smut or fluff though. I’ve been wanting to this for a bit, but my motivation has been a bit.. meh. Hope you all like it, the smut version is up. Btw, I’m so grateful for you all, it’s crazy that I’m almost at 1K. Mwah, hugs and kisses to all of you. Wouldn’t be doing this if you all weren’t so kind and supportive, so thank you sm. <3

My bot requests are open, submit one via the link in my bio. ᰔᩚ
